payload.text:
# STITCH BY GOOGLE - PAGE DESIGN PROMPTS
## Kwara Political Hangout (KPH) News Portal

**Instructions:** Copy each prompt individually into Stitch by Google to generate each page. Build pages in the order listed for best results.

---

## BRAND GUIDELINES (Reference for All Pages)

**Color Palette:**
- Dark Red (Primary): #8B0000
- Charcoal Grey: #2F4F4F
- Clean White: #FFFFFF
- Light Grey: #F5F5F5

**Typography:**
- Font: Arial
- Headlines: Bold, 24-32px, Dark Red
- Body: Regular, 14-16px, Charcoal Grey

---

## PAGE 1: HOMEPAGE

### Prompt for Stitch:

```
Create a professional news website homepage for "Kwara Political Hangout" (KPH).

HEADER SECTION:
- Top thin bar (40px height) with charcoal grey background (#2F4F4F)
- Small white social media icons aligned right: Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn
- Main header below: clean white background
- KPH logo on left side (circular logo with text)
- Navigation menu on right: Home (active in dark red #8B0000), News, Politics, Media, People, About, Contact
- Navigation items in charcoal grey (#2F4F4F), 16px Arial semi-bold
- Active/hover state: dark red color (#8B0000) with 3px bottom border
- Add subtle bottom border (1px #F5F5F5)

HERO SECTION - Featured News Grid:
- Full-width section with max-width 1400px
- Asymmetric grid layout:
  - LEFT: One large featured article (60% width, 600px height)
    - Full-width background image with dark gradient overlay
    - "FEATUREL NEWS" label in top-left corner (dark red #8B0000 background, white text, uppercase)
    - Headline in white, 32px bold Arial, positioned at bottom-left with 30px padding
    - Date stamp below headline: "June 28, 2023 • 4 hours ago" in light grey
    - Example headline: "Kwara UPR Anugwe Empars Sade Univerity Political News waiter confirmation"
  
  - RIGHT: 2x2 grid of smaller articles (40% width)
    - Top-left article: Image with overlay, headline "Kwara Political Hangout tor prelident the learo politics in political insreactors"
    - Top-right article: Image with overlay, headline "Sus fire Champes buef Malh tlowa ilnue easties principlsed brorting accidential"
    - Bottom-left article: Image with overlay, headline "Kwara Political Hangout: Lay tooKes time Political newnielements confirmation"
    - Bottom-right article: Image with overlay, headline "Rhaming's brand regotiated polity atuil kuniverily, New Eocuc MoSidear"
- Gap between grid items: 15px
- All images should have dark gradient overlay (rgba(0,0,0,0.6))
- Hover effect: slight zoom on images (scale 1.05), smooth transition

MAIN CONTENT AREA - Two Column Layout:
- Container: max-width 1200px, 40px padding vertical
- Layout: 70% left column + 30% right sidebar, 40px gap

LEFT COLUMN:
1. "Latest Headlines" Section:
   - Section header: dark red background (#8B0000), white text "Latest Headlines", 20px bold, 10px padding
   - Horizontal list items (5-7 articles):
     - 100x100px thumbnail on left
     - Title in charcoal grey, 16px bold, max 2 lines
     - Small excerpt, 14px, max 2 lines
     - Timestamp with clock icon, 12px grey
     - 1px light border between items
     - Hover: light grey background (#FAFAFA)
   - Example articles from the image visible on left side

2. "Kwara Politics" Block:
   - Section header: dark red background (#8B0000), white text "Kwara Politics"
   - One large article card:
     - Full-width image (16:9 ratio)
     - Title below: "Kwara Political Hangout to Sumesairy Kwara Political Hangout"
     - Excerpt: 2-3 lines of text
     - Date: "March 15, 2022"
   - Below: 2 smaller article thumbnails side by side

3. "Media Insights" Block:
   - Same header style as Kwara Politics
   - Same layout structure
   - Article: "Political Hangout demni jds across award of tiroepotive Confirmation"

RIGHT SIDEBAR:
1. Newsletter Sign-up Box (sticky on scroll):
   - Header: dark red background (#8B0000), white text "Sign up Newsletter", 18px bold
   - White body with 20px padding
   - Text: "Sign up to sign upfor of the news and more."
   - Email input field: placeholder "Email address", light grey border
   - Submit button: full-width, dark red background (#8B0000), white text "Sign Up"
   - Hover effect on button: darken to #6B0000

2. Social Media Section:
   - Title: "Connect with us" (small text)
   - Four large social icons in 2x2 grid: Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, YouTube
   - Icons should be colorful (brand colors)

3. Popular Posts Widget:
   - Header: dark red background (#8B0000), white text "Popular Posts"
   - 4-5 articles:
     - Small 60x60px thumbnail on left
     - Title (14px bold, max 2 lines)
     - Date (12px grey)
     - Example: "Kwara Political Hangout to Sumesairy Political Hangout" - May 12, 2022

FOOTER:
- Charcoal grey background (#2F4F4F), white text
- Three columns:
  - Left: KPH logo (white version), tagline "Politics, Media and people"
  - Middle: Quick links (Home, News, Politics, Media, People, About, Contact)
  - Right: Contact info (email, phone, social icons)
- Copyright bar at bottom: darker shade (#1A1A1A), centered text
- "© 2025 Kwara Political Hangout. All rights reserved."

MOBILE RESPONSIVE:
- Hamburger menu for navigation
- Hero grid stacks vertically
- Two-column layout becomes single column
- Sidebar moves below main content

Use placeholder images of political figures, government buildings, and press conferences. Ensure all text is highly readable with proper contrast.
```

---

## PAGE 2: NEWS/ARTICLES LISTING PAGE

### Prompt for Stitch:

```
Create a News Listing page for "Kwara Political Hangout" (KPH) news website.

HEADER & FOOTER:
- Use the same header and footer from the homepage
- "News" navigation item should be active (dark red #8B0000)

PAGE TITLE SECTION:
- Full-width banner with light grey background (#F5F5F5)
- Large headline: "News" in dark red (#8B0000), 48px bold Arial
- Breadcrumb below: "Home > News" in 14px charcoal grey
- 60px vertical padding

CONTENT LAYOUT:
- Max-width 1200px container
- Two-column layout: 70% left + 30% right

LEFT COLUMN - Articles Grid:
- Filter/Sort bar at top:
  - Dropdown: "Sort by: Latest" (dark red accent)
  - Category filters: All, Politics, Media, People (pill-style buttons)
  - Active filter: dark red background (#8B0000), white text
  - Inactive: light grey background, charcoal text

- Article cards in grid (2 columns on desktop, 1 on mobile):
  - Card structure:
    - Featured image (16:9 ratio, full width)
    - Category label overlaid on image (dark red #8B0000 background, white text, top-left)
    - White card body with 20px padding
    - Headline: 20px bold, charcoal grey, max 3 lines
    - Excerpt: 14px regular, charcoal grey, max 3 lines
    - Bottom metadata row:
      - Author name with small avatar
      - Date with calendar icon
      - Read time (e.g., "5 min read")
    - Border: 1px light grey
    - Hover effect: slight shadow, lift effect
  
- Sample articles:
  1. "Kwara UPR Anugwe Empars Sade University Political News"
  2. "Kwara Political Hangout: Latest Political Developments"
  3. "Sus fire Champes brief: Government Policy Updates"
  4. "Media Insights: Press Conference Analysis"
  5. "Kwara Politics: Legislative Session Highlights"
  6. "Political Hangout: Community Engagement Report"

- Pagination at bottom:
  - Numbers: 1, 2, 3, ... 10
  - Previous/Next buttons
  - Active page: dark red background (#8B0000), white text
  - Hover: light red background

RIGHT SIDEBAR:
- Newsletter sign-up box (same as homepage)
- Search widget:
  - Header: "Search News"
  - Search input with magnifying glass icon
  - Dark red search button
- Popular Posts (same as homepage)
- Categories widget:
  - List of categories with article counts
  - Dark red bullet points

MOBILE RESPONSIVE:
- Article grid becomes single column
- Sidebar moves below main content
- Filter bar becomes dropdown menu
- Cards stack vertically with full width

Use images of politicians, government sessions, press conferences, and community gatherings.
```

---

## PAGE 3: SINGLE ARTICLE PAGE

### Prompt for Stitch:

```
Create a Single Article page for "Kwara Political Hangout" (KPH) news website.

HEADER & FOOTER:
- Use the same header and footer from homepage
- Relevant navigation item active based on category

ARTICLE HEADER SECTION:
- Full-width featured image (16:9 ratio, max 1400px wide)
- Dark gradient overlay at bottom
- Category label overlaid: dark red (#8B0000) background, white text, uppercase
- Article title overlaid at bottom: white text, 42px bold Arial, 40px padding

BREADCRUMB:
- Below featured image, on white background
- "Home > News > Politics > Article Title"
- 14px charcoal grey with chevron separators

ARTICLE CONTENT AREA:
- Max-width 800px container (centered)
- 40px padding

ARTICLE METADATA:
- Author section:
  - Author avatar (50px circle)
  - Author name (bold, 16px)
  - Author title/role (14px grey)
  - Social share icons aligned right (Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, WhatsApp)
  - All in horizontal row

- Publication info:
  - Published date: "June 28, 2023 at 2:30 PM"
  - Updated date (if applicable): "Updated: June 29, 2023"
  - Read time: "8 min read"
  - View count: "1,234 views"
  - All in 14px charcoal grey with icons
  - Separated by dots

ARTICLE BODY:
- Main content in 16px Arial, charcoal grey (#2F4F4F)
- Line height: 1.8
- Paragraph spacing: 24px

- Typography hierarchy:
  - H2 subheadings: 28px bold, dark red (#8B0000)
  - H3 subheadings: 22px bold, charcoal grey
  - Pull quotes: 24px italic, centered, dark red left border (4px)
  - Bold text: for emphasis
  - Links: dark red color, underline on hover

- Sample article content about Kwara politics:
  "ILORIN - The Kwara State political landscape witnessed significant developments this week as major stakeholders convened to discuss pressing issues affecting governance and community development.
  
  The Kwara Political Hangout, a prominent platform for political discourse, hosted a crucial meeting..."

- Include 2-3 inline images within the article:
  - Full-width images
  - Captions below: 14px italic grey
  - 40px spacing above and below

- Include a highlighted information box:
  - Light grey background (#F5F5F5)
  - 20px padding
  - Dark red left border (4px)
  - Title: "Key Takeaways" in bold
  - Bullet points of main points

TAGS SECTION:
- Below article content
- Label: "Tags:" in bold
- Tag pills: light grey background, charcoal text, rounded corners
- Example tags: "Kwara Politics", "Government", "Policy", "News"
- Hover: dark red background, white text

SOCIAL SHARE BAR:
- Sticky on left side (desktop) or bottom (mobile)
- Vertical row of social icons
- Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, Copy Link
- Share count displayed below each icon
- Dark red background when hovered

AUTHOR BIO SECTION:
- Light grey background box (#F5F5F5)
- 20px padding, rounded corners
- "About the Author" heading
- Author avatar (80px circle)
- Author name (20px bold)
- Short bio (2-3 lines)
- "Follow" button (dark red)
- Social media links

RELATED ARTICLES SECTION:
- Heading: "Related Articles" (28px bold, dark red)
- 3 article cards in horizontal row:
  - Thumbnail image (16:9 ratio)
  - Category label
  - Headline (18px bold)
  - Date
  - Border and hover effect

COMMENTS SECTION (Optional):
- Heading: "Comments (12)" (24px bold)
- Comment form:
  - Name, Email, Website fields
  - Comment textarea
  - Submit button (dark red background)
- Display 3-5 sample comments:
  - Avatar, name, date
  - Comment text
  - Reply button

SIDEBAR (Desktop only, 300px wide, sticky):
- Table of Contents:
  - Auto-generated from H2 headings
  - Dark red for active section
  - Smooth scroll on click

- Newsletter signup (compact version)
- Popular Posts widget
- Advertisement placeholder (300x250)

MOBILE RESPONSIVE:
- Featured image height adjusted
- Article content full width
- Sidebar content moves to bottom
- Social share bar becomes bottom fixed bar
- Related articles stack vertically

Use images of government buildings, political meetings, community events, and Kwara State landmarks.
```

---

## PAGE 4: POLITICS CATEGORY PAGE

### Prompt for Stitch:

```
Create a Politics Category page for "Kwara Political Hangout" (KPH) news website.

HEADER & FOOTER:
- Use the same header and footer from homepage
- "Politics" navigation item active (dark red #8B0000)

CATEGORY HERO SECTION:
- Full-width banner with dark red background (#8B0000)
- Large heading: "Politics" in white, 56px bold Arial
- Subheading: "Latest political news, analysis, and commentary from Kwara State"
- White text, 18px, max-width 600px
- 80px vertical padding
- Subtle pattern or gradient in background

FEATURED ARTICLES SECTION:
- Max-width 1400px container
- Label: "Featured" in dark red, 24px bold
- Grid of 3 large article cards (horizontal on desktop):
  - Large featured image (16:9 ratio)
  - "Featured" badge (dark red background, white text, top-left)
  - Article overlay at bottom with dark gradient
  - Headline in white, 24px bold
  - Excerpt: 2 lines in light grey
  - Date and author in light grey
  - Hover: zoom effect on image

SUBCATEGORIES/TOPICS BAR:
- Horizontal scrollable bar
- Topic pills: "All", "Legislature", "Executive", "Governance", "Elections", "Policy"
- Active topic: dark red background, white text
- Inactive: white background, charcoal text, 1px grey border
- Smooth scroll, minimal scrollbar

MAIN CONTENT:
- Two-column layout: 70% left + 30% right
- Max-width 1200px

LEFT COLUMN - Articles Feed:
- "Latest in Politics" heading (28px bold, charcoal grey)

- Article cards (stacked vertically):
  - Horizontal card layout:
    - Image on left (280px wide, 180px height)
    - Content on right:
      - Category label: "Politics" (dark red)
      - Headline: 22px bold, max 2 lines
      - Excerpt: 14px, max 3 lines
      - Metadata: Author, date, read time
      - Read more arrow (dark red)
    - White background
    - Border: 1px light grey
    - 20px margin between cards
    - Hover: shadow and slight lift

- Sample articles:
  1. "Kwara Governor Announces New Development Initiatives"
  2. "State Assembly Passes Critical Legislation"
  3. "Political Analysis: The Impact of Recent Policy Changes"
  4. "Opposition Party Responds to Government Proposals"
  5. "Kwara Political Hangout: Legislative Session Review"
  6. "Community Leaders Meet with Government Officials"
  7. "Electoral Commission Updates Voter Registration Process"

- Load More button at bottom:
  - Dark red border, charcoal text
  - Full width, 50px height
  - Hover: dark red background, white text

RIGHT SIDEBAR:
- "Trending in Politics" widget:
  - Header: dark red background, white text
  - Numbered list (1-5) of trending articles
  - Small thumbnails
  - Headline only, no excerpt
  - View count or trending icon

- Newsletter sign-up (same as homepage)

- "Must Read" section:
  - Editor's picks
  - 3 article thumbnails
  - "Editor's Pick" badge

- Political Calendar widget:
  - Mini calendar showing upcoming political events
  - Dark red for event dates
  - List of upcoming events below

- Advertisement placeholder (300x600)

PAGINATION:
- Centered at bottom
- Numbers with Previous/Next
- Active page: dark red background
- Standard pagination styling

MOBILE RESPONSIVE:
- Hero section adjusted height
- Featured articles stack vertically
- Topics bar remains scrollable
- Article cards become full-width
- Images on top, content below
- Sidebar moves to bottom

Use images of government buildings, legislative sessions, political figures, official ceremonies, and governance activities.
```

---

## PAGE 5: MEDIA CATEGORY PAGE

### Prompt for Stitch:

```
Create a Media Insights Category page for "Kwara Political Hangout" (KPH) news website.

HEADER & FOOTER:
- Use the same header and footer from homepage
- "Media" navigation item active (dark red #8B0000)

CATEGORY HERO SECTION:
- Full-width banner with charcoal grey background (#2F4F4F)
- Large heading: "Media Insights" in white, 56px bold Arial
- Subheading: "Press analysis, media coverage, and communication insights"
- White text, 18px
- Icon or graphic representing media (microphone, camera, newspaper icons)
- 80px vertical padding

FEATURED MEDIA COVERAGE:
- Label: "Featured Coverage" (24px bold, dark red)
- Large showcase card (full-width, max 1400px):
  - Split layout: 50% image left, 50% content right
  - Large image of press conference or media event
  - Content side:
    - "Media Insights" label (dark red)
    - Large headline: 36px bold
    - Extended excerpt: 3-4 lines
    - Author and date
    - "Read Full Analysis" button (dark red background)
  - White background with subtle shadow

MEDIA TYPES FILTER:
- Horizontal tabs: "All Media", "Press Releases", "Interviews", "Analysis", "Reports"
- Active tab: dark red bottom border (3px), dark red text
- Inactive: charcoal text
- Clean, minimal design

MAIN CONTENT:
- Two-column layout: 65% left + 35% right

LEFT COLUMN:
- "Recent Media Coverage" heading (28px bold)

- Media article cards (mixed layouts for variety):
  - Every 3rd card: Full-width featured style
    - Large image
    - Overlay with headline
    - Dark gradient
  
  - Standard cards: Horizontal layout
    - Thumbnail left (240px)
    - Content right:
      - "Media Insights" category label
      - Headline: 20px bold
      - Excerpt: 2-3 lines
      - Quote icon if article contains interview quotes
      - Source attribution if press release
      - Date and author
  
- Sample articles:
  1. "Press Conference: Governor Addresses Development Plans"
  2. "Media Analysis: Coverage of Political Developments"
  3. "Exclusive Interview with State Commissioner"
  4. "Government Press Release: New Policy Announcement"
  5. "Media Watch: How Newspapers Covered the Budget"
  6. "Communications Review: Official Statement Analysis"

- Load more button (dark red border)

RIGHT SIDEBAR:
- "Latest Press Releases" widget:
  - Dark red header
  - List of recent official press releases
  - Government seal icon
  - Date stamps
  - Download PDF links

- "Upcoming Media Events" calendar:
  - List of scheduled press conferences
  - Interviews
  - Media briefings
  - Date, time, location

- Newsletter signup

- "Media Partners" section:
  - Logos of partner media organizations
  - Grid layout, greyscale
  - Hover: color

- "Press Contact" info box:
  - Light grey background
  - Contact details for press inquiries
  - Email and phone
  - Social media handles

QUOTE/HIGHLIGHT SECTION:
- Every few articles, insert a highlighted quote card:
  - Large quotation marks
  - Pull quote from recent article
  - Dark red accent
  - Attribution to source

MOBILE RESPONSIVE:
- Hero adjusted
- Featured card stacks vertically (image top, content bottom)
- Filter tabs become dropdown
- Cards become full-width, vertical layout
- Sidebar content moves below main content

Use images of press conferences, media events, interviews, microphones, cameras, journalists, and official spokespersons.
```

---

## PAGE 6: PEOPLE/PROFILES PAGE

### Prompt for Stitch:

```
Create a People/Profiles page for "Kwara Political Hangout" (KPH) news website.

HEADER & FOOTER:
- Use the same header and footer from homepage
- "People" navigation item active (dark red #8B0000)

HERO SECTION:
- Full-width banner with clean white background
- Large heading: "People" in dark red (#8B0000), 56px bold
- Subheading: "Profiles of key political figures, government officials, and community leaders in Kwara State"
- Charcoal grey text, 18px
- Silhouettes or outline graphics of people
- 60px vertical padding

FILTER/SEARCH SECTION:
- Max-width 1200px container
- Search bar:
  - Large search input (full-width on mobile)
  - Placeholder: "Search for people..."
  - Dark red search button with magnifying glass icon

- Filter options in horizontal row:
  - "Filter by:" label
  - Dropdown: Position (Governor, Commissioner, Legislator, Community Leader, etc.)
  - Dropdown: Department/Ministry
  - Dropdown: Sort by (Name A-Z, Recent, Popular)
  - Active filters shown as removable pills below

FEATURED PROFILES SECTION:
- Label: "Featured Profiles" (28px bold, dark red)
- Grid of 3 large profile cards (horizontal on desktop):
  - Professional portrait photo (square or circular)
  - "Featured" badge (dark red)
  - Full name: 24px bold
  - Title/position: 16px, dark red
  - Brief description: 2-3 lines
  - Key achievements bullet points (3 points)
  - "View Full Profile" button (dark red border)
  - White background, subtle shadow
  - Hover: lift effect

MAIN PROFILES GRID:
- Heading: "All Profiles" (28px bold, charcoal grey)
- Grid layout: 3 columns desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobile

- Profile cards:
  - Portrait photo (square, 300x300px)
  - Overlay on hover showing:
    - Social media icons
    - "View Profile" button
  - Below image:
    - Full name: 20px bold
    - Title/Position: 16px, dark red
    - Department/Ministry: 14px grey
    - Brief one-line description
  - Clean white background
  - Border: 1px light grey
  - 20px padding
  - Hover: shadow effect

- Sample profiles:
  1. State Governor - Executive
  2. Deputy Governor - Executive
  3. Speaker, State Assembly - Legislative
  4. Commissioner for Finance - Executive
  5. Commissioner for Education - Executive
  6. Senate Representative - Legislative
  7. Opposition Party Leader - Politics
  8. Community Development Leader - Civil Society
  9. Women's Affairs Commissioner - Executive
  10. Youth Leader - Civil Society

STATISTICS SECTION (Insert after first 12 profiles):
- Light grey background (#F5F5F5)
- Full-width container
- Heading: "By the Numbers"
- Grid of statistics in 4 columns:
  - "50+ Government Officials"
  - "30+ Legislators"
  - "25+ Community Leaders"
  - "100+ Profiles"
- Large numbers in dark red
- Labels in charcoal grey

SIDEBAR (Desktop, 300px):
- "Categories" widget:
  - List of profile categories with counts
  - Executive Branch (25)
  - Legislative Branch (18)
  - Judicial Branch (8)
  - Community Leaders (30)
  - Opposition Party (15)
  - Dark red bullet points

- "Recently Added" widget:
  - Small profile thumbnails
  - Name and title
  - "New" badge in dark red

- "Most Viewed Profiles" widget:
  - Numbered list 1-5
  - Small thumbnails
  - Name only

- Newsletter signup

PAGINATION:
- Standard pagination at bottom
- Load more option available

MOBILE RESPONSIVE:
- Search and filters stack vertically
- Featured profiles stack vertically
- Profile grid becomes 1 column
- Sidebar moves to bottom
- Touch-friendly card sizes

Use professional portrait photos of various ages, genders, and traditional/modern attire representing Kwara State's diversity.
```

---

## PAGE 7: ABOUT PAGE

### Prompt for Stitch:

```
Create an About page for "Kwara Political Hangout" (KPH) news website.

HEADER & FOOTER:
- Use the same header and footer from homepage
- "About" navigation item active (dark red #8B0000)

HERO SECTION:
- Full-width banner
- Background: Subtle pattern or texture in light grey
- Large KPH logo centered
- Heading: "About Kwara Political Hangout" in dark red, 48px bold
- Tagline: "Politics, Media and people" in charcoal grey, 24px
- 100px vertical padding

MISSION STATEMENT SECTION:
- Max-width 800px container, centered
- White background
- 40px padding

- Heading: "Our Mission" (32px bold, dark red)
- Mission text in large, readable font:
  "Kwara Political Hangout is dedicated to providing comprehensive, accurate, and timely political news and analysis for the people of Kwara State. We serve as a trusted platform for political discourse, government accountability, and community engagement."
  - 18px, charcoal grey
  - Line height: 1.8
  - Center-aligned

CORE VALUES SECTION:
- Light grey background (#F5F5F5)
- Full-width
- 60px padding

- Heading: "Our Core Values" (36px bold, centered, dark red)

- Grid of 4 value cards (2x2 on desktop):
  - Icon at top (in dark red)
  - Value name: "Accuracy", "Integrity", "Independence", "Community"
  - Description below (2-3 lines)
  - White background
  - Centered text
  - 30px padding
  - Shadow on hover

Example:
1. ACCURACY
   Icon: Checkmark shield
   "We verify all information and maintain the highest journalistic standards"

2. INTEGRITY
   Icon: Badge/certificate
   "We report without bias, providing balanced coverage of all perspectives"

3. INDEPENDENCE
   Icon: Flag/pillar
   "We remain independent from political influence and special interests"

4. COMMUNITY
   Icon: People/network
   "We serve the people of Kwara State and give voice to community concerns"

WHAT WE COVER SECTION:
- Max-width 1200px
- White background

- Heading: "What We Cover" (36px bold, dark red)

- Two-column layout:
  LEFT:
  - Image of newsroom, journalists, or press conference
  
  RIGHT:
  - Bulleted list with dark red bullet points:
    - Political news and developments
    - Government policies and decisions
    - Legislative activities
    - Electoral processes
    - Media analysis and press coverage
    - Community engagement
    - Public affairs
    - Political profiles and interviews
  - Each item: 16px, with brief description below

OUR TEAM SECTION:
- Light grey background
- Full-width

- Heading: "Meet Our Team" (36px bold, centered, dark red)
- Subheading: "Dedicated journalists and professionals committed to quality reporting"

- Team grid (4 columns):
  - Profile photo (circular, 200px)
  - Name: 20px bold
  - Role: 16px dark red (Editor-in-Chief, Senior Reporter, Political Analyst, etc.)
  - Brief bio: 2 lines
  - Social media links (LinkedIn, Twitter)
  - White cards with shadow

Example team members:
1. Editor-in-Chief
2. Political Editor
3. Senior Reporter
4. Media Analyst
5. Community Correspondent
6. Digital Manager

TIMELINE/HISTORY SECTION:
- Max-width 1000px, centered
- White background

- Heading: "Our Journey" (36px bold, dark red)

- Vertical timeline:
  - Years on left in dark red circles
  - Milestones on right:
    - 2018: "KPH Founded"
    - 2019: "Launched digital platform"
    - 2020: "Expanded coverage to all LGAs"
    - 2021: "Introduced multimedia content"
    - 2022: "Reached 100,000 monthly readers"
    - 2023: "Launched mobile app"
    - 2024: "Established media partnerships"
    - 2025: "New website launch"
  - Connecting line in dark red
  - Icons for each milestone

EDITORIAL POLICY SECTION:
- Light grey background
- Max-width 800px, centered
- 40px padding

- Heading: "Editorial Policy" (32px bold, dark red)
- Text sections:
  - Independence and Integrity
  - Accuracy and Verification
  - Corrections and Accountability
  - Privacy and Confidentiality
  - Comment and Opinion Guidelines
- Each section: Bold subheading, paragraph of text
```
